user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Daniel Farrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0WkJKRxRlXu0V-f-Ul4t9lwMvSMYQKbDUY8DLC3jZoL-o3tA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It was a nice mall with a decent selection of shops.  The top floor was quite hot and uncomfortable, and the atmosphere was a bit run down.  I wasn't overly impressed with its glamor.

The parking was relatively useful if you have a small car.  I find it frustrating that they limit parking so much in general in Spain.  If you are in anything larger than an SUV, you can skip this stop.

The Dunkin was a nice touch though!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQCCqTE2J5oQwULrvuyzrr&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2025-7-18"},{"Name":"Tom Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKakUsBKh3lbWplL_C7crmzVx2wI2ZqDt3ZD0cjsuahDgMEJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Be extremely cautious of the people around this area, you can’t tell who are good people who are bad people.  Most importantly, thieves and criminals are watching you, awaiting for you to be distracted or make mistakes.  We were robbed on the first day we arrived to Madrid, we rent a car and travel to this area in hope to find a bank to exchange money and grab a bite.  It was 12 noon and broad daylight, with my car parked along the street stepped about 30 feet to the money exchange place, with less than 15 minutes, they ransacked my car and took all my luggage, backpack, everything else they find in the car, thing like sunglasses and jacket.  They did so swiftly that I didn’t even noticed, as I get back to car and drive to my Airbnb, that’s when I opened my trunk and noticed all my luggage are gone.  My wife and i stranded without any personal belongings on the first day and feeling very distraught.  We have hear lots of tidbits about pickpockets and scammers but this experience show that there is more than that,  thieves and criminals must have on lookout at a constant pace, watching everyone in-n- out, arriving and leaving awaiting for us to make mistakes.  Granted, I forgot to lock my door, we were stepping away for only about 30 feet and still in broad daylight (noon time), but yet they managed to robbed us clean.  We are talking about 3 pieces of full size luggage and few other large item, we were in a busy /crowded area, I am sure many of the business establishments must have witnessed the whole thing unfolding and probably have seen this quite often.  After experiencing the bad ordeal on the first day of arrival, we were so disappointed of Spain, we booked a flight home.  I written all this just to let people know that, Madrid is not safe and you can find yourself in dire position if you don’t careful.  Thieves and criminals are watching you and awaiting to rob you whether it’s day or night.  We canceled the last leg of the trip to Barcelona and come home right after the experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Martínez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrjNTkGR-EcSgQdNmXWVQlp-P4RaZdlb2TD5ba47RXmT6wnziuog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pretty good for a city mall! Parking is good, there is a parking lot and a parking garage. They have all the major stores, H&M, Primark, all the Zara family of stores, C&A, Decathlon City, loads of places to eat on the top floor, a Mercadona to do your shopping and a movie theater. I am rating it a four because I feel that they don't keep the bathrooms up to snuff. The times that I've been there, I've found dirty stalls with unflushed toilets and no soap in the automatic dispensers. I understand it's the customers doing this, but they should have someone coming round once an hour or so to check this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICF-dCpPg&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2023-10-29"},{"Name":"Bubble Ha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBQ6OBgGqLdNppM4K6PJ759fYleuYvLD6B6cC-TB_G4MvIltwB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great experience shopping at this mall. Very clean, lots of space and good restroom facilities. Only thing I could not find was an information board or shops listing. Hence one star less.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"franchesca avila","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXn1loxQ3ZhbHfB8dEuFJ4nUzy0Oqc8gR1So97T4EeIA61htIAUhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice and clean,has lots of good stores and kid friendly...love the restaurants...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9eJrL_ZSzQUmNb0Y2GHXd&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2025-8-21"},{"Name":"Jose Luis Torres Caceres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9_6hcoSNrweYMI1WgaQQYQa4RFKgYHrM1JYjAnGshyZXTvbdD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great selection of stores and nice shopping experience. Not close to any Metro station but taxis are easily available at any gate. Plenty of restaurants and coffee shops, clean restrooms. Visited at the end of summer and air conditioning was kept nice and cold.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dean Elliott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVwDKYCwrh6-cQAuT43-wjFQHZND4N454Pr9_QfY6Kwzc7-f_4SA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good. Excellent barber inside opposite Mercadona. Kevin from Pereira, Colombia. I wish Spanish people were as friendly as Kevin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hector Zelaya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7PhKa9Rmxl5_1uYGtydt9vQ6ooFXTGEdZL0kCuklIWfYbZsdTYg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We made the trip from Gran Via to Plenilunio. After several stations and a 15 min walk, we arrived. It was worth the trip! Plenilunio is beautiful, trendy, and well kept. We had a great time with my wife and kids. You’ll find multiple food options on the 3rd floor and stores, including Primark, Zara, and others. You’ll enjoy it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICG-OT52AE&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2021-10-20"}]

[{"Name":"perkash singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXu7dcywv_MNTpZCBxFUFb1gvAFECTC4kFSV3h0P_mvDjKCFOmk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I visited this shopping mall, and while it was large and looked nice, the experience was quite strange. There were multiple leaks from the ceiling, even inside some of the stores, which really lowered the overall standard. It’s hard to take a mall seriously when the roof isn’t even watertight.

On top of that, the escalator to the food court wasn’t working, so we had to leave the mall and enter again from another side — a pretty frustrating experience.

That said, we did find what we were looking for in the shops, so overall it was an okay visit, but definitely not impressive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_0vaaHFlBbYuLmtbGy3F5&fid=0x0:0xccee98581c84edbe"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"Saeed Mekdachi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7RJZpf6joc02gEvFLUNwN31iMDXswJ6IRbKOZaKOC4Ao2eRQG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Mall contains everything you would need. Lo conozco desde hace 40 años cuando nos trasladamos a vivir a la Alameda de Osuna. Tal como ha sucedido con la mayoría de mercados, su momento de esplendor fue dando paso a situaciones un poco más complicadas por el cambio que se fue presentado, a lo largo del tiempo, en la forma de compra de los ciudadanos. Esto llevó al cierre de varios puestos. No obstante, por las últimas vivencias sufridas por todos, hemos vuelto a valorar el gran servicio que prestan estos mercados y lo útiles que son. Cuando vas al Mercado de la Alameda de Osuna, te encuentras con un excelente trato personal, unos puestos amplios, limpios y cuidados, con productos de buena calidad a muy buen precio. Merece la pena realizar la compra en este lugar y de paso ayudamos a mantener viva la llama del comercio de proximidad.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICW6tjoNQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x919e62831a7731a4"],"When":"2022-2-23"}]

I just don't go there anymore.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P Gallardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvq1LoOAURd9rJ0dvC6mvmTuyDEwP0z1G7idOZ9wWUxmX-I6TK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is another shop for the brand inside the suburb market. It has some bakery and fresh out of the oven bread.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyBEoy62o8wE_gkZwIJx9RhNiA6L2rb0Dsvcd4GTH3FEboBzw9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice quality bakery","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"José Antonio Alonso Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR2YQJciZg3UrFJcSTIv4imw3Bzg7bDiiIabobmnIK4lDgMtQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Too comercial,..not personal","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MariovilloSo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVXDEe2lhqZvPvEES4UleEsWwR2YahVb1oGSsUUlmvXB5rr5TT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El pan bueno les llega a las 10. El trato es fantástico y siempre hay varias personas dispuestas a atenderte con una sonrisa. Los panes y galletas de muy buena calidad/precio. Yo voy uñas dos o tres veces por semana pues el pan te lo dan parte si quieres para congelar. Lo mejor las hogazas, la de trigo normal o la moña las de mejor precio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzgUkZhOR-pK4sY5JNvcz5&fid=0x0:0xf43f2571ff61ba2f"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Andrea PD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjwAO5-DuPFXCPc_o5-JKJR-ZRJvNloc9HulLSoWnyLZBB-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Vamos a menudo a esta panadería/pastelería y siempre compramos sus panes de masa madre, ya sean hogazas o barras. Especial mención para la gallega de masa madre y la hogaza de espelta y quinoa, que están espectaculares.

Los pasteles y dulces de ocasión también son muy buenos —el roscón de reyes, por ejemplo, es impresionante—. Es cierto que algunos panes y bollos no los hacen en su propio horno, y se nota algo en la calidad; por ejemplo, los pain au chocolat parecen ser congelados.

Lo que realmente marca la diferencia con respecto al local de Avenida Cantabria, y lo que nos hace preferir venir a este, es el trato. Valeria, Helen y Daisy son encantadoras, siempre amables y atentas, nada que ver con la atención del otro local, que deja bastante que desear.

Además, aquí la máquina de cortar el pan deja las rebanadas más gruesas, algo que también preferimos.

En conclusión, una panadería/pastelería muy recomendable, con un pan excelente y un equipo que hace que quieras volver.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vanessa Vieites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvsQdAnLo3w9tDe-Tvzz5cYk9iv4gAiqHe1KOPl1WgJD4Zs4tO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Magnífica. El sabor es maravilloso en todos los productos que he comprado y la atención una maravilla como siempre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOv5uISHgYHGiAE&fid=0x0:0xf43f2571ff61ba2f"],"When":"2025-5-16"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ctgb2","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItC9iDa9r9g_651odkZll6vFcFOS4APKRO34THBDIzmKIUQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped by Alcalá Norte mostly by accident while exploring a more residential side of Madrid, and it felt very different from the big flashy malls near the center.

This place is clearly built for locals. Not luxurious, not trendy — just practical. You’ve got supermarkets, everyday clothing stores, small electronics shops, and a simple food court. The kind of mall people actually use for errands rather than spending an entire afternoon shopping.

The atmosphere is calm and normal. Families doing groceries, teenagers hanging out after school, older couples sitting with coffee. It feels real compared to tourist-heavy areas.

Food options were basic but affordable, which was honestly refreshing after city-center prices. Nothing gourmet, but easy and convenient.

It’s not somewhere you travel across Madrid to visit — but if you’re nearby and want to see everyday life instead of attractions, it works perfectly.

Overall:
Not exciting, but authentic. A neighborhood mall rather than a destination, and that’s exactly its charm.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jason Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdSTIM222cwStEOhRt2EALfmVqUWOwP149WtsB61NuZ00xoLIwUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The cinema is good value but the shopping center is very strange.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Urban Traveler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZY0HoHOb7lzycQDWjKey0rY0ABGKAZdibLczqX3_UWre4TRE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pathetic. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"PL Lau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_kjCx3N7Oe5EIg03qgHTSqYbHJ9Dr8h6_hZbfJqZYWeYejkv9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐ A Modern Architectural Landmark with Great Vibes!

Caleido is a spectacular addition to the northern part of Paseo de la Castellana. It’s much more than just a business tower—it’s a unique hybrid of a shopping center, park, and food court that has become a favorite spot for my family.

Architecture & Atmosphere
The modern architecture is truly impressive. It’s a very pleasant place to walk around any day of the week. The layout is open and airy, making it a perfect spot to enjoy the outdoors while still being in a commercial hub. I often bring my daughter here in the afternoons to skate, and it feels safe and spacious.

Dining & Terraces
The restaurant area is beautiful and definitely the highlight for me. There is a fantastic variety of places to find something to eat or drink. The terraces are wonderful for relaxing and enjoying the "luxury" vibe of the surroundings. Whether you're looking for a quick bite or a sit-down dinner, the food court area is top-notch.

Shopping Note
While the environment is great, the shopping side is a bit different. The stores are definitely on the expensive/luxury side and, as a result, often seem quite empty. While it fits the aesthetic of the business district, it doesn’t always feel like the most practical or profitable shopping destination for everyone.

Final Verdict
Despite the high-end prices in the shops, Caleido is a must-visit for the experience alone. It’s a great place to shop, eat, and hang out with family in a stunning modern setting. If you’re in the area, it’s well worth stopping by just to appreciate the building and the great selection of restaurants!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC36XKbcT45X9ssc-fD7ast&fid=0x0:0xa8c1d0fb23902328"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"ARCH. Los clientes valoran su ubicación conveniente en Calle Córdoba S/N, su variedad de productos frescos y el trato cercano de los comerciantes.
Entre los aspectos más destacados según la experiencia de visitantes y la información disponible:
•	Atención personalizada: Los comerciantes suelen ofrecer un trato amable y profesional, lo que genera un ambiente de confianza y cercanía.
•	Calidad y frescura: Las pescaderías y otros comercios del centro son reconocidos por la frescura de sus productos, especialmente en el caso de pescados y mariscos.
•	Variedad de tiendas: El centro cuenta con diferentes establecimientos, lo que permite realizar varias compras en un solo lugar, facilitando la vida diaria de los vecinos.
•	Accesibilidad: Su localización en San Fernando de Henares lo hace fácilmente accesible tanto para residentes como para visitantes de la zona.
En resumen, Comercial Valencia en San Fernando de Henares es una excelente opción para quienes buscan productos frescos y un trato cercano, en un entorno cómodo y accesible para toda la familia","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDTGV-JQUezox5xaz87jtXg&fid=0x0:0x80b86a905f564f11"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Beac","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKLbb88vJZyyB_9rO9K5bYbVobQok-RfIRx5xh3KnPAUzY5QA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pues mira que llevo años viviendo muy cerca y no había ido antes.
Fenomenal. La calidad de todo muy muy buena. La pescadería genial, la frutería maravillosa, los embutidos igual. Muy recomendable. Por la tarde tienen servicio de aparcamiento gratuito, y los sábados por la mañana también. No dejéis de ir si queréis un melocotón que sepa a melocotón,  o si queréis que el pescado te lo limpien a la perfección,  este es tu sitio 😉","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDO7Nngcg&fid=0x0:0x80b86a905f564f11"],"When":"2022-6-29"},{"Name":"Alberto el críticas.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWskMOTuOqNXV-FFcX35zTpaTeVa7ySF1Kx15kVoVkDPNwozWw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nos encanta esta galería de comercios de toda la vida, siempre que podemos encargamos la carne en la casquería, nos encanta su carne picada, carrillada de ternera, etc. Carne de primera calidad.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV31-Xd53FClDuvwshIgx1kO8BAC2J2-cfLeA-CX2GxQXo6IHFp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"la ubicacion es excelente pero la gestion de la empresa que lleva los locales de abajo no tiene muy contentos a los puestos alquilados. el mercado ya no tiene tantos puestos pero es aceptable","Images":null,"When":""}]

It is definitely targeted add more teenaged guests and that age group is also the cast majority off people on Fridays/Weekends where it is quite full (not really atmosphere for a pleasant diner). During the week, the majority of guests is adults having lunch and less busy. Apart from restaurants, decent Cinema is also here. Parking is friendly towards disabled visitors or ones with accessibility requirements, accompanied by elevators to reach 2nd floor.","Images":null,"When":""}]

It is also located in a great area with Ikea and Carrefour within walking distance.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Casper Nielsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcwecoy4CA6XJsGieOH4R22zjJghstqDxncL-cdQxJCx8_bg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful shopping mall in the north of Madrid with an impressive design — the big dome and marble interior make it feel quite unique. I’ve visited several times and it always has a great mix of shops, from fashion to electronics and home goods. There’s also a fine selection of restaurants for when you want to take a break while shopping. It’s spacious, easy to park, and generally well maintained. It can get crowded on weekends, but overall it’s one of the best and most comfortable malls in the","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Faisa Lisa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLNI_UQ5onbiN12oq_AB30HzyiHt_4wk94avLAupctpj-Plst4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Have been there for dinner at the Italian restaurant some years ago, the mall is good, the memory was remarkable 💕","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4ueWXfkepj4h2DRn8vBgi&fid=0x0:0xabbb242cbe4258e0"],"When":"2025-7-28"},{"Name":"Lyubomyr Marynovych","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbjrMTk_i83HH3Jx44PJLmgF4nG25MQDqU-571afA4UdW6pqa2GQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great shopping mall. A lot of space. Well organized. Clean restrooms. Free underground parking for the first 3 hours.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICX9_mViAE&fid=0x0:0xabbb242cbe4258e0"],"When":"2024-10-21"},{"Name":"David Vaneyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbyXucoOjKgjP-be9Jw9ybI_bskuInfinxhd7cscZ67QNbgloD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful, clean shopping center with luxurious appearance. Bigger than you’d expect.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQNuVWUvlDBFi7oc8uDlUM&fid=0x0:0xabbb242cbe4258e0"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"ImagesAround","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUHWrlO0OvuYwv8dyArZO_CClRsgZ-lBAi9_UlBLw7RjIhsti2NQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"A rather depressing place, with weird neon-fucsia lights, mish-mash of seating spaces and very slow service.
Not the workers' fault, as there were only two on the shift. They are probably doing their best. With the huge amount of workforce available in Madrid, why not hire a few more to be able to lower the waiting time for customers?
The metal chairs, with a narrow sitting surface, are an absolute punishment for your back
Some of the clients have left their trays on the tables instead of emptying them in the designated area which, by the way, is not very visible.
Perhaps they didn't even notice it.
Why not place a large, fun sign to help customers contribute to the cleaness of the place?
The tacos were average and we had to wait for them for about 15 min. And the restaurant was almost empty.
Brighten up the place, hire extra workers and install some soft, elegant lights.
The space has potential.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb55vhbQ&fid=0x0:0xabbb242cbe4258e0"],"When":"2024-7-30"}]

A good place to spend some time before taking trains since it is on top of an important train statiok, Principlo.  The supermarket, Mercadona, is big and has reasonably priced items.  There is a small dining area where you can eat the food bought from the supermarket.  The area is well equipped with knives, forks, spoons, microwave, tissues and water for cleaning.  This supermarket closes at 2:30pm on Saturdays and Sundays but opens till 9:30pm on working days.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1ZxdI92Misyiko2lz3VDp\u0026fid=0x0:0xe9ab165aab6d7aec"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Jonty Montes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0kEE6LOo2WLaIL9JjzS_2966A7wseM0ZHU027o9-9mnxo5A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Handy for a quick stop: set right in the Príncipe Pío transport hub, easy by metro/train. You’ll find high-street fashion (H\u0026M, Mango, etc.), plenty of casual dining, and a Cinesa cinema. Great for a “movie + bite” evening. Open daily until 22:00 (Sundays/holidays from 11:00). Not Madrid’s biggest or most upscale mall, but super practical","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wizard of oz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoFxXYY4XMz_HalIhvt1bqTaU4wCY4FATx5NzUbuItM9y0Yb8wUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Handy mall with plenty to choose from..There are selection of restaurants at the food court, a descent supermarket and a cinema..it is located next to the metro which makes the transportation very easy..there are also bus stops near by for other means of transportation..İts a not far away from the Royal Palace which looks stunninning.One down side of the place is that there are too many homeless people outside one of the main entrances..its a discrace Madrid municipality cant do much about this situation..The securities doing there best for any unplesant situations and is highly appreciated..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEu46k0QE\u0026fid=0x0:0xe9ab165aab6d7aec"],"When":"2019-4-5"},{"Name":"Maribel Aristy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxQAIQzZgtyNKD2CJWI-Wa5P2lSlkiRGBF-G64ZiSt_SOtlTAj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This mall is VERY close to the city center. We enjoyed our visit. Highly recommended. We are definitely coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb8tvvMQ\u0026fid=0x0:0xe9ab165aab6d7aec"],"When":"2024-7-25"},{"Name":"Sal Toosi Vancouver Real Estate","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUghu2iVHBluE6Jf_2a7Q8BXFWNbtgA9YHP_dMwpuBSjh4AK-Q1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Just ok. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Teeps","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0rsIRi4iQp3MNv2HaA3LOirbzvdy32cUcDPXIfrh_j_eaxA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For leisure and family-friendly fun it’s strong: the complex includes entertainment features like go-karts, zip lines over the lake, cinema, green open spaces, good if you’re visiting with friends or kids.

The design and atmosphere aim high: landscaped green areas, open-air spaces, water features, a lake, so going there feels more relaxed and “resort-like” than a typical indoor mall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAUk83qfBfXD5s47iPe_lxO&fid=0x0:0xd574640f57f5a563"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Daniel Farrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0WkJKRxRlXu0V-f-Ul4t9lwMvSMYQKbDUY8DLC3jZoL-o3tA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I told my wife that if all malls were like, I would go with her all the time!! Wow!

It's such a cool atmosphere. It felt more like a resort than a mall.  Definitely recommend this mall over the other ones in the area.  It was also very clean and had a band playing in the center by the water.

Pretty awesome place!

A+","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB-33DL63EEPXeRRmGuyhc_&fid=0x0:0xd574640f57f5a563"],"When":"2025-7-19"},{"Name":"Gioconda Vidal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_BeH8v8g4i3MS8R-cGVvYH7AgtFkiGcuxlDOSOKRjTQvcY-HZtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This outdoor mall just outside Madrid is really nice, and pretty big. If you’re staying in Madrid you should know that you need to take the train Cercanías in Atocha Station to be able to go to this mall, and then walk about 2 miles to the mall unless you take an Uber, Bolt, Free Now, etc., and pay no more than €6 which is exactly what I paid on my way back to the train station around 9 pm.

This mall is perfect for spring, Fall and Winter time with these nice temperatures. Summer time could be a little hot, but if you like the heat, you'llbe fine. This mall offers quite a few selection of stores very popular in Spain and Europe but not to much to the US. Except for Nike and Adidas, all other clothing stores are perfect for shopping and get pieces that are in season or not available in the US. Plenty of restaurants of all types, ones better than others, super affordable prices compared to similar restaurants in the US. Quality of food is great, and service goes from good to amazing in most restaurants. You will also find entertainment for the young ones, zip lining in the roof top, movie teather, water fountain, playground, etc. The futuristic aerodynamic design of this mall will make you feel (for a moment) like if you are entering a Theme Park…..It’s worth it the trip from Madrid, so enjoy the shopping, dining, and Viva España 🇪🇦","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCoi5_JggE&fid=0x0:0xd574640f57f5a563"],"When":"2025-4-19"},{"Name":"Cristian Zapata","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-_NPKtOpbSe9ODREWDh3mGYp2pLtmQ4bdr8bta0Qn-O2GoelN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The space was very clean and well-maintained and The location was convenient and offered great deals","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfK6WI0Zp9-90NOrF8bpK8&fid=0x0:0xd574640f57f5a563"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"MJ La-Fernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5aql77ofsF80v-mmqFIwF6ure-gMHMX10sy1WrOadcYSJZMr2RA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This shopping mall is very relaxing and has a variety of shops including restaurants. There’s plenty of parking but if you’re talking the public transport, there’s only a bus. It’s a family friendly shopping mall and in the weekend, there are loads of kids and families sitting around the water pond. Enjoy ☺️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzg5mdlwE&fid=0x0:0xd574640f57f5a563"],"When":"2024-6-4"},{"Name":"Jaime Fontanella Lauzardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs9XAd8e1h4_aoTqOX8rnU8Z5x9re3ECsObT6um_9nsWi4DiX0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Here you will find a lot of shopping and gastronomical options. Beautiful design that actually looks like a true Oasiz. Great place for Mall lovers 😎. Located at Torrejón de Ardoz, it is well communicated to Madrid. I loved the water show (I am sharing a small video) and “las meninas” that are used as ornaments.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH_riywwE&fid=0x0:0xd574640f57f5a563"],"When":"2024-9-5"},{"Name":"Anthony Pascal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWc0HMc640rVL_V4uTIu9ZKlLbGyG15ulMM9U0VIAQluWNVadTJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful Shopping Center to visit in Madrid! Nice stores, nice restaurant, there is a fountain’s show! Really good to spend time with your family and friends.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx4PL55wE&fid=0x0:0xd574640f57f5a563"],"When":"2023-5-8"},{"Name":"Crucian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJs-kRioetM6eyv2wHjHim7UCLYRtLCW1VWF6V4llMjUVPjI4q8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s very clean, enjoyable and fun to go around with some friends or family members. There is everything you could ask for: food, games, electronics, fountains, restaurants and so on. The main part is outside, where you can stay hours looking at the location and doing photos. Gets easily 5 stars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB6a3EOA&fid=0x0:0xd574640f57f5a563"],"When":"2022-12-29"}]

Es un mercado de toda la vida en el que te atienden genial. Te puedes llevar tus tuppers y te preparan la carne pero la señora de la tintorería espanta a toda aquella persona que se acerca, es antipática y parece que no quiere que su negocio funcione.

Salvo por la TINTORERÍA, TODO PERFECTO.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"G “Deszentrada” BSanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTgYGEfdY7VQo2QwRDmYx2BCd4ZgRZvWoiXLRG114qTWdUqBB-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"La frutería es una maravilla y el frutero no puede ser más amable y servicial. Te aconseja y se asegura de que te llevas lo mejor. Hay varias fruterías nuevas por el barrio y más baratas pero no tienen nada que ver. Empecé a ir por casualidad hace poco y, definitivamente, ya no lo cambio.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cristina BN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNg7JKM6lNzjHXLAeS4nB4ZeHVxxxSTz_jYwfHIwk4sIPqSqsGtA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"eme aquí, en el mercado del barrio,  a la vieja usanza, de estos que recuerdan a mí tierra y a lo de la tierra. Tiene frutería, pescadería, pollería, carnicería, panadería, ultramarinos y tienda de costura. Los precios y los productos son de primera. Calidad precio es un acierto y, lo que me encanta es que en dos veces que vas ya te conocen, saben más o menos que vas a pedir y el trato es tremendamente cercano.

Iván, el carnicero, es lo más, yo como asturiana me tira hacer potes al estilo de mi tierra y tiene morcillas de casa y chorizos del bierzo que le dan a ese pote ese sabor auténtico. Yo ánimo a que la gente pregunte que tiene y de donde procede la carne porque pueden sorprender sus proveedores, chorizos dulces de Soria o el bierzo, carrilleras de cerdo de Segovia o ternera de Ávila. Te lo corta como quieres y entiende perfectamente de lo que hablas.

Carlos, el pollero, entiende y sirve todo lo que tiene que ver con el pollo, perdices y incluso conejos. Me comenta que todo o es de corral de de las tierras madrileñas. Producto de primera teniendo en cuenta que es temporada de caza de perdices y conejos. También tiene algún plato preparado preconizado.

El frutero es un crack, te recomienda lo de temporada y le sirven siempre el lunes a primera hora de la mañana, fruta fresca de temporada. Me asombro que tuviese lechuga de Batavia (gallega), laurel fresco, perejil y jengibre. Además, de verdura está muy bien surtido.
Los ultramarinos son algo caros y de productos de fuera, con lo que no te sale muy a cuenta cogerte algo fuera de un poco de mortadela de la tierra o queso de campo real. Es lo único que echo de menos en este mercado, la charcutería.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nancy Cumbicus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKT-MJKEyGaS76_AcWp2vv2nHrXorwgZWJybA0VWDpXc7iHgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Soy una clienta nueva. Todos son muy atentos y los productos son de muy buena calidad.
APOYEMOS este pequeño comercio para que no desaparezca.🙂","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pablo Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvC3NRZj9mMOynHOtjmR-vh_sVH_6cA7wukB7D31iKPtDyoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy buena calidad-precio en carecería, charcutería y pescadería.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mar Vega","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQVlycKmARHOIhz0zdeJ9q_Uzq3v4oh-323Hnqa4D_lAx4hyiWsA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Compro con frecuencia. [{"Name":"Janice Chiang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnFruuhhKqn9_1r_DkaG9zdtjHkCcb1rFRNu7uTfRCk0dDrEUC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to hang out and shop at! A lot less packed than the stores in city center and you find better deals and more sizes though still having a decent crowd.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvp_5XhZ2uLMxeGI6bO9f2&fid=0x0:0xf00a1384ed1877c7"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"CanQing Chen (Simon)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8L1CC9T_rhyuYveMK2YUMMtVv7b48EUHNWcJjv_R2FOirkshw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good sight and scenery, the location is convenient to get to, if you enjoy a walk, this place is definitely for you.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADHg_dfk7Gao1V6Ufir1jn&fid=0x0:0xf00a1384ed1877c7"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Gioconda Vidal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_BeH8v8g4i3MS8R-cGVvYH7AgtFkiGcuxlDOSOKRjTQvcY-HZtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This Mall is Amazing especially at night time, when the lights and the humungous electronics screens outside the mall are on and illuminates the entire area.
A few stories tall, maybe 5 or 6 floors I  didn't count,  this mall has everything you need to stay shopping or just window shopping for at least a couple of hours.
Nice layout, popular stores, a food court, restaurants, parking garage, and playground for the kids. The nice formal restaurants are located in the top floor.
This Mall is right across a small bridge from "Matadero Madrid" a very popular Art Center of which i had written a review too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDmmMPn6gE&fid=0x0:0xf00a1384ed1877c7"],"When":"2022-1-18"},{"Name":"Liam Stivala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzaaA4Fn13wElzxP4EAyOFQ1_vBpJAsvTIENRnV3dBFLX7PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ate dinner at wanderlust within the mall and were very happy with the food and service. On another note there were some good Black Friday deals even in the watch and jewellery shop on the second floor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCIWX0rPQvZ_D1GdvqWeqDr&fid=0x0:0xf00a1384ed1877c7"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Thejus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVj2cP9oUhZQPfEJNa7IEg-N3oPMGWatAev9NRxxhvORZC8sWSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Its like any other typical shopping mall. Its quite organised and well built. There are all kind of stores, from groceries to dresses. There are some options of food outlets as well so when you are tired after shopping you can chill out and binge here.
All the outlets are reasonably priced.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk1NnEcQ&fid=0x0:0xf00a1384ed1877c7"],"When":"2019-6-21"},{"Name":"Caleb Agbesi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZ4ry-77qtscTdLg8gOqNDckRZ0vMHC_R-NWG87wDJVnf17dNCDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Beautiful atmosphere. 1st time visiting don't stress, there are information panels at the entrances with all shops, services, transport information etc. great food too. La inmensa gama de marcas hace que puedas elegir entre muchas gamas de oridi tos de cosmética y para farmacia. Te avisan con SMS cuando dejas encargado un fármaco y la atención es excepcional. Me encantaría que fuera 24 horas para las urgencias, puesto que no hay ninguna en Mirasierra, pero entiendo la dificultad añadida con el personal.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marta Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlQqbq-hK7Wb1P3bWrNlDiCtpSKmTcvPv8NKvJaJFY2Vp8zouY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Me han abierto el coche hoy sobre las 13:40. Han reventado la cerradura y al coche de al lado igual.  La seguridad del centro comercial no se hace responsable, solo te dicen que pongas una denuncia de la policía. ¿Para qué sirve la seguridad y tanta cámara? Una vergüenza","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"celia guisado arnillas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYhBq5Izqtv_pzgR2OQ4_YdbIDQZqEs2jfldVnSpbbtADSUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Me gusta, porque tiene la farmacia y Ahorramás, pero es completamente imposible aparcar vayas a la hora que vayas….voy a tener que dejar de ir…","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"yves schmidt-beyer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEu_XM-btJWeSdEvmUQGtBw6YUEFnVxHSuajoAEv4ZS1u3aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El centro comercial en sí no está mal.   Pero el tema del parking es horrible ! Todo el barrio lo usa para aparcar como si fuera su propio garaje.   Los coches allí metidos por días . Si tienes un coche eléctrico , olvídate de cargarlo.   La gente dejan sus coches allí todo el día cargando

No entiendo como no lo pueden arreglar de la manera más fácil : poner barreras como en cualquier centro comercial , dar dos horas gratis y así lo usarán la gente que van allí a hacer compras y no estará abusado como el parking del barrio","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sergi Kalakatl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8s-hwHAX7KmmUMoq-exsKX46B-5iwfe4kQo-_PtzzzPPS8GOt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nun, es ist merkwürdig, dass die Leute an einen nationalen Supermarkt namens Ahorramás denken, aber in Wirklichkeit handelt es sich um eine spanische Franchise des deutschen Supermarkts Netto, der diese Galerie mit drei weiteren deutschen Läden bewohnt: Tedi, Aldi und Midas. Eine weitere merkwürdige Sache, die kein Zufall ist, ist, dass direkt hinter den Türen der Mall, gleich auf der anderen Straßenseite, ein riesiges deutsches Schulgebäude steht. Also, Es gibt keine Informationen über die TEDi- und Midas-Läden im Keller der besagten Galerie. Bis die Informationen vollständig sind, gebe ich einen einzigen Stern, vielen Dank","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDzlMmYaA&fid=0x0:0x132de719ac647996"],"When":"2024-6-7"},{"Name":"Maria Teresa Prada Blanco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXr9RGrwFo4fgDZqfFGpIOOL74oausbzvLHV27hP1PS8bOmNsxydA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Es una vergüenza lo que hacen los empleados del taller midas . Se pasan dando vueltas y bloqueando todos los espacios de los usuarios de la plaza que se van . Parece que se dedican más a bloquear plazas que a reparar coches . No conformes con tener bloqueadas todas las que se encuentran en su lado . No.me extraña que tuviera que cerrar la juguetera.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Alexander Visram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRMIdmACRS2ZoPYZz1Ejq_pidQxGXV0SCV0O-ks8f8vW8fRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"El Corte Inglés is a great store and I’ve spent a lot here on my visits to Madrid. The staff in Sanchinarro were also genuinely helpful.  My issue is with the “10% Reward Card” I picked up on 4th January (after seeing it advertised for tourists). I believed the first 5 days were for accumulating credit/reward, and that the balance would then remain usable for longer. Instead, I discovered the card (and any remaining balance) expires after just 5 days.   I had €75 remaining and when I tried to use it, I was told it had expired. The staff member at the till was excellent; she made calls and suggested I go to the 6th floor Customer services, after she couldn't help, which I did.   But the final response was that I should have “read the small print” on the back of the card. Yes, it may be written there, but relying on tiny print for a 5-day expiry that wipes out customer money is poor customer experience for me. If I’d understood it clearly, I obviously would have used it within the 5 days.
What I’m asking for is not unreasonable as it was mine and I would have spent it anyway at CI.   As a gesture of goodwill please reinstate the €75 (e.g., a standard gift card), and improve how this is explained at point of sale (large print / verbal reminder / clearer signage).
If a manager or customer service replies to this review, I’m happy to provide the card/receipt details privately. I don't think that is unreasonable really?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbShx10kDcxH3lujfW6Za5hSwn2UpZovqaCiZkF-uHObtJ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited the appliance section for fridges and Begoña made the experience outstanding. She patiently answered my questions, checked stock for me, and later even spotted a brand promotion that saved me an extra €100. I don’t speak Spanish, yet she remained kind, patient, and helpful the whole way through, making sure everything was properly set up and clearly explained. I wasn’t a regular Inglés customer before, but Begoña truly changed my perception of the brand. El Corte Inglés needs more staff like her: professional, thoughtful, and sincerely pleasant to interact with.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Athena KONG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUd3ZEroh8LN7e2N9CumMEU9vyR6sbcfTULEj3UMYMNOhD-vd0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So lucky there’s Inglés nearby. I love the cheese and Sertina part most. You can always find more choices for any kind of product.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBpCmro0oUj4Jt_oxWC69sm&fid=0x0:0x33ddb6d60b1f4a83"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Ricardo Vegas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDPiTIbtzofrE_2VIO8A1ILFSYPIToGWc__NjkCZgogsNsScYDcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Staff is rude, they discriminate based on your clothing and skin color. It's repulsive. They will simply not help you or give you wrong information if you're not deemed well dressed enough or simply if you're not white. I do believe El Corte inglés has this racism problem deeply internalized. It's sad but easy ti confirm.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDg5b2iPQ&fid=0x0:0x33ddb6d60b1f4a83"],"When":"2025-2-26"},{"Name":"vivek sinha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaCbHSdt14RuLdfrqca3_Ldhc6qjlErLkVWfIrvlWuX_DjBVBJCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10 useful informations

1. Huge ...probably the biggest El corte ingles store in Madrid
2. All in one place ... from cloths, eye wear, electronics to car wash and car repairs ...
3. Three levels of parking with free kids play zone beside parking area (there are paid play.zone as well)
4. Hypercor in same promises
5. All school uniforms - you have to visit this store, not the any El corte Store
6. Few food options- only 2 (one restaurant and one cafe) but taste wise good - at floor 1
7. Excellent services, most are English speaking
8. Little expensive but then good in quality
9. Elections section is really huge
10. Washroom is only at lower floor both end","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE9fSOmQE&fid=0x0:0x33ddb6d60b1f4a83"],"When":"2017-9-10"},{"Name":"Peterson Toscano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6Vg7bt4uJiX-7B7GDGglHfbG_RNxqDcUD5G1W0BW-3LQag3QV9g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The only type of shopping I enjoy is grocery shopping. This is by far the finest supermarket I ever encountered. It will s like a museum of fresh foods. The fish and seafood department had creatures I only ever saw in aquariums. The quality is high fever r everything I saw and they give liberal samples. They even gave us samples of gin and vermouth.

Do not go hungry though or you will buy enough food for an army.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcxu_HRg&fid=0x0:0x33ddb6d60b1f4a83"],"When":"2020-1-7"},{"Name":"sm 5o","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJC6FTrZTqwULXMZy_Grf4VUGO2vVzK5JclAeUZl2th6SKW-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came here to exchange some shoes i bought and mr,Novillo helped me allot with the selection his patience is unmatched not one he complained but on the contrary he was smiling all the time","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWC9_cLVRZAZWQmPBEdk7IIQff7gk7MsQ3ANr9I4AzTXpe7jjk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a typical Corte Inglés, you can find almost anything!
And of course not as crowded as others. Nice place to go shopping quietly, or eat something, without a bunch of tourists...","Images":null,"When":""}]

So if you visit Leganés then this is a place you must visit weather you shop or not. Totally amazing mall","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID8tcK5Ew&fid=0x0:0x548a9e723e1b1824"],"When":"2020-7-23"},{"Name":"Alka Kaushik #lyfintransit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0K_nncP-EyKfQKGTZUoPe4hfS1y2rVWKODEwfE-aywqdOXVS_VA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Happy space for family shopping trips. With brands like Zara, El Corte Inglés, Primark, AlCampo, KFC, Five Guys and many more under one roof, this commercial centre in the southern far end of Madrid is nothing short of a Mecca for visitors and locals alike. As always, I have picked up most of my shoppings from Parquesur since it was barely 3-4 kms from where I was based during my entire stay in the Spanish capital. Head to nice Cafes and restaurants when tired or hungry before indulging in another round of shopping! My personal favourite is fnac for stationary and electronics items and I never forget to have coffee and pasta at Pans & Company. They offer perfect combination of beverage and vegetarian items. AlCampo is anyday a perfect choice for grocery shopping in style.
Ample parking lot and convenient pick up/dropping points for cabs.
Elderly and kids friendly. Took my 70+yrs Mom and she was absolutely delighted.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICsjubMywE&fid=0x0:0x548a9e723e1b1824"],"When":"2020-2-1"},{"Name":"Armanul Islam Rimon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8OPk4SGYlLjcEoIprF-_ju13LK-ycANwsU6SYAgW4bdGOG_0F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"it's a large and impressive shopping center that offers a wide variety of stores, restaurants, and entertainment options. With lots of stores and restaurants/cafes, there's no shortage of options to explore, from fashion and electronics to home goods and more. In addition to the impressive selection of stores, the shopping center also offers a range of entertainment options, including a movie theater, arcade, and fitness center. The shopping center is always clean and well-maintained, with friendly and helpful staff and plenty of amenities like restrooms and food courts throughout. It's a great destination for families, friends, and anyone who wants to enjoy a day out and about. Overall, I highly recommend for anyone looking for a fantastic shopping and entertainment experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRtdzmWg&fid=0x0:0x548a9e723e1b1824"],"When":"2023-4-30"}]

Rodeados de centros comerciales y alguna otra tiende de una cadena que le hacen competencia. Pero resisten. Yo compró aquí a pesar de vivir a ocho kilómetros, cerca del Bernabeu.
Motivo. El trato es personal. El género bueno. El precio algo más caro. Pero cuando vas a comprar te conocen y saben de que equipo eres, donde has nacido, donde vives, etc. No creo que pagar un par de Euros, si es que es más caro, no compense por manejarte con gente que te conoce y ofrece un gran servicio.
Prueba y veras como no tiene punto de comparación con los grandes hiper y la tienda de la cadena.

Resultado: no lo hago.
Es una lastima porque hay muy buenos Puestos con excelentes productos de buena calidad, pero... es lo que hay. Ojalá tuviera más puestos abiertos. La charcutería de Ovidio todo un clásico.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ramon Marquez Oñez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBoMZOvKaIcYC2qB3g35tOHlifCoCwDSCwdKUX1ysgHU4pcg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es una pena que más del 50×100 de las paradas están cerradas; la galeria creo que es amplia, cómoda y accesible para moverse las pocas paradas que quedan tienen productos de calidad y personal profesional y atento, hay una charcuteria con una amplia y exquisita selección de quesos, no recuerdo el nombre hoy ha sido mi primera visita porque vivo lejos peri seguro que volveré merece la pena","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cristina López Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJ4we3FoifOAUYyvZes8nStQbxwHS2Dvt9eCULZP1JHgmQcIKUwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mercado muy completo y tradicional, con mucha variedad de establecimientos y productos de gran calidad. La casquería de Rafa genial sobre todo relación calidad precio. La tienda de variantes muy completas nueces, castañas, atún delicioso. Zapatero de toda la vida que encuentra diferentes formas de arreglar zapatos. Fruterías con extensa variedad. Totalmente diferente a la frialdad de las grandes superficies en la que la calidad relavion precio brilla por su ausencia. Además el barrio alrededor es alegre con muchos locales de todo tipo y bares para tapear como se debe. Aparcamiento complicado pero dando alguna vuelta es relativamente fácil encontrar hueco aunque no sea muy cercano. He llegado para pagar el parking ya que la barrera no me dejaba salir porque no te dan ningún tipo de ticket al entrar. Me ha dicho que tenía que pagar 10,55€ lo cual me parecía excesivo para 3 horas que he estado, así que me he puesto a calcularlo con la calculadora del móvil y más o menos cuadraba. Cuando he ido a pagar en el datáfono, me había puesto 18,55€, es decir, 8 € más de lo que me había dicho inicialmente. Lo ha intentado hacer también con un chico que había detrás de mí. Además, le he pedido 3 veces una hoja de reclamaciones y no me la ha dado. Así que dejo aquí mi reseña. No volveré jamás. Pésimo trato","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis Molina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7m9Ty1TQwzmzguaertJmpOOdm4mADLTCzeE0t5QwDRuin7w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Les doy una estrella y por darles algo , hoy hemos tenido un suceso increíble para cualquier humano , resulta que vamos a caja para pagar por el tiempo que habíamos estado metidos dentro , cuando llegamos al coche nuestra bebé de 7 meses se hace caca , la cambiamos y vamos a salir , cuando que sorpresa no habré la puerta , lo comprueba el tío que tiene en la garita y ve que desde que que pagamos la primera vez hasta que hemos ido a barrera habían pasado 6 minutos , por 6 minutos hemos tenido que volver a pagar , son unos sinvergüenzas, ojalá la gente deje de usar este tipo de sitios ya que los alrededores son zona blanca","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nereida Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4Kkb3yjzblF0EddgNhlZ-L7273XXj530suQ6czmvd2eLwXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Estuve usando el parking durante dos meses y, tras solicitar la baja, continuaron cobrando mi cuenta durante nueve meses más, sumando un total de 578 euros. user_reviews: [{"Name":"MADARIAGA Magdalena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJg4CR003-qsmqAGvlhWV-e7YJGn93COtXTA_SNReWyMFmjxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible customer service skills. I was looking at some perfumes with my mom and 2 employees, a women and a man literally ambush us( the women ripped the perfumes from my hand with the excuse of \"taking them to till\" before even we had a chance to check the testers and decide if we are gonna take them both or just one of them. Meanwhile the man posted himself behind me making me feel uncomfortable, treating me like a thief about to fly with the products. Also following us through the store the whole time to the point we decided mid shopping to just get only one perfume and to get out of there as soon as possible due to my ruined mood of shopping and the level of uncomfortable by being followed through the store. Definitely not going back there before they train their staff to be more polite with foreigners.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"DeeDyTza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2G-QmXBt0Xh5JWLBvHqJN2ZxVg8TL62_C-ptiUBNTTiRGlvk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible experience in this 2nd Primor shop(the one with gold interior) opened not long ago. There were literally 10 attendees and probably 6 people max in the whole shop. I was in a rush and had to buy a gift for a kid so I just grabbed the product from the shelf and went to cash register to pay. There were 4 girls at the check out desk just gossiping and 2 more at the shelfs close by pretending to do something but very active in the conversation. I literally stand in front of them for minutes while they were looking into my eyes without even asking if they can help me. Only when I was about to put the product down to walk away my mom had to tell them if they are gonna ring me out.Instead of at least say they didn't knew I'm ready to pay they look at us with such hatred for interrupting their conversations that I almost feltI have to apologisejist for breathingaround them. Such disgusting behaviour from a customer service employees, I rather buy online from other stores than deal with this kind of attitude again. Definitely not purchasing from Primor stores again since it seems they have this policy where I, as a customer, have to beg their employees to take MY money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alin Alin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpDp4FrdiWIkjrER3RHwlPSzkO_W4oq5EHDCoixEt9xp8l7S70=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible customer service. I will never spend money there ever.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yemisi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVB7ebBQo4fEJIhOeSuSMxtiYjorUZTtp-qWEJqMohqTAW87DxwUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Ok. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mar S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHJWOtwWTfmEOTq6HzihXgjGGY3KY5ua-f885LRG8IweOtXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una pena que ya no sea ni la sombra de lo que fue. Quedan 4 puestos contados en su interior y están destinados a desaparecer en cuanto sus dueños se jubilen.
En el pasado se respiraba vida en sus pasillos. Había cercanía y hermandad entre los vecinos. Había calidad en sus productos y mucha variedad.
Estoy seguro que es de esas cosas que cuando desaparezca del todo, la echaremos de menos. Y también estoy seguro de que, tarde o temprano, el valor de tener un mercado en el barrio, con buena calidad de producto y variedad, volverá a imponerse ante la mala calidad y el "sírvase usted mismo" de los supermercados.
Son pocos los puestos que sobreviven pero son la historia del barrio.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ivan Gamo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxRuVCmE_nHUrj-rlHT0jMqcP413WMsZTbzcPEq_3RemZycj8w-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Es el típico mercado de barrio, de los que ya quedan pocos. Actually Maria showed how helpful, open to customer needs, friendly and professional the shopping assistant should be. 100% role model. Give her a raise!

Dear Algo Bonito managers:
Please make sure your staff remains happy and motivated to keep the same level of service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mª Soledad Crespo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvFgFGBDGQgEwdFk8hpf5u_s-Gb47aPeS0tya_8eMmCG7HmXaFtQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevo mucho comprando en Algo Bonito y no la cambio por nada. Generalmente el que produce los vende acompañado de un canto o Pregón que da más espontaneidad a la Venta. Otros pocos puestos de variantes, bolsos, ropa y utensilios de cocina.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-lJTa2QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x255ac85ce2a2a67f"],"When":"2022-10-27"},{"Name":"Elba Pazos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpw9KrBRKRXotawn4F-8k8_Sg8gtOK2iaYfXliLM-pIzlfQXo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El mercadillo semanal de los jueves de vicalvaro (aunque está ubicado en valderrivas) es el mercadillo típico español donde encontrarás variedad de frutas, legumbres, granos, hortalizas e incluso ropa y zapatos. Es bastante popular entre los lugareños de vicalvaro y más que todo visitado por los vecinos de la tercera edad que llevan años haciendo su compra semanal de los jueves en este mercadillo. Es de muy fácil acceso, tanto con transporte público (buses), caminando como lo hacen la mayoría de los vecinos, o en coche ya que dispone del parking del paseo del\nPolideportivo. La sede de la Policía Municipal de vicalvaro está justo lateral y por tanto se siente la presencia de funcionarios policiales resguardando la zona. A menos de 2 cuadras está la Estación de Puerta de Arganda y Cercanías.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDsopvhnQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x255ac85ce2a2a67f"],"When":"2020-2-28"},{"Name":"ali ak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5pWIaAOJtnC94NgIuTtMAc5fl5B-zZY6xPR6IrFaqWJOd9gc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Cuidado con lo que te venden y revisa bien el estado, suelen colarte productos en mal estado.\nNo es la primera ves que me pasa","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELuD0f6Z4Z--Vg\u0026fid=0x0:0x255ac85ce2a2a67f"],"When":"2025-5-22"},{"Name":"Victoria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIc2o-XxT36LQ6YdXHYp1Xv4oQB4yj1BcaOZAfLIZc6FUGb2SEz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hay bastante variedad y buenos precios. • Martes: de 09:30 a 14:00 h.  ￼
• Sábados: de 09:30 a 15:00 h.  ￼

📍 El mercadillo suele instalarse en el centro de Majadahonda, entre calles como Santa Catalina, Erillas y La Luna.  ￼

🔎 Consejos:
• Llega temprano para evitar aglomeraciones y encontrar mejor aparcamiento.  ￼

Considero que ayudaría que los criterios y normas se comunicaran y aplicaran de forma clara y consistente para todos  , ya que esto aporta transparencia y facilita la experiencia.

Como persona con TEA, la claridad y previsibilidad en las normas son especialmente importantes para que el entorno resulte accesible y seguro.

Esta reseña refleja exclusivamente mi experiencia personal y se comparte con intención constructiva y de forma legítima, en el ejercicio normal de aportar una opinión como usuaria. title: Vía Lusitana Farmers Market
address: Vía Lusitana, 2, Carabanchel, 28025 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Closed"],"Monday":["Closed"],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["9 am–2 pm"],"Tuesday":["Closed"],"Wednesday":["Closed"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Miguel Pérez Valiente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDcIH_PjRFD6srtK9z9KtDlz2O-0sjnxlP9JC5x3IK-HkptQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Un foco de suciedad e insalubridad para los vecinos.
La Junta de Distrito de Carabanchel permite la celebración del Mercadillo de los jueves incluso sabiendo que después del cierre no se podrá mandar al equipo de limpieza viaria debido a las altas temperaturas del verano.
Así que los vecinos de las calle aledañas quedan rodeados de basura orgánica, cajas, bolsas, etc. La noche es un festín para las ratas y las cucarachas. Los vecinos que en noches estivales tienen que dormir con las ventanas abiertas reciben el olor fétido de los restos de frutas y verduras en descomposición.
Algo que sería impensable en otros distritos de Madrid es recurrente en el barrio de Abrantes. La junta de distrito prefiere el beneficio económico derivado de las tasas que pagan los dueños de los puestos a la salubridad de los vecinos.
El barrio está absolutamente lleno de fruterías y supermercados. Este mercadillo tuvo su momento hace treinta años, ahora es solo un foco de problemas para los vecinos.
No se puede tener este espectáculo frente a un parque consolidado como el de la Emperatriz María de Austria
Basta ya de maltrato a los vecinos (contribuyentes-votantes) del barrio de Abrantes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAE94kZaIQ7-gLCub2_BlA-&fid=0x0:0x17f2311617e47570"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"Olga Corral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFCFNMrrTwjfd8NUe7zZJLv0lJqLLuCI6u7nvOyhmL49DnHg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Soy vecino de la calle Vía Lusitana,
Por segunda vez en este verano no se ha limpiado después de finalizar el mercadillo de fruta, dejando la calle nuevamente completamente cubierta de restos orgánicos en putrefacción, cajas, bolsas y todo tipo de basura.
Aunque ya se ha respondido en otras ocasiones que el Ayuntamiento no puede limpiar porque pondría en riesgo la salud de los trabajadores de la limpieza por las altas temperaturas (algo que es comprensible), el hecho de permitir la celebración del mercadillo incluso sabiendo de antemano que no se va a poder limpiar (ustedes mismos son los que avisan a la población de las alertas por inclemencias del tiempo y altas temperaturas), significa una falta total de respeto por los vecinos y por la salubridad de las calles. Los restos orgánicos atraen ratas, cucarachas y otros animales e insectos; la fruta y verdura en descomposición crean focos de olor insoportable que afectan al bienestar de las familias.
Ustedes están poniendo en riesgo la salud pública de este barrio tan frecuentemente abandonado por las administraciones públicas.
Les conmino a reflexionar sobre sus obligaciones con la ciudadanía. Proteger la salud de los trabajadores es algo innegociable, pero también lo es proteger la salud de la ciudadanía (un barrio popular con muchísimas personas mayores y con niños no debería verse expuesto a estas condiciones de insalubridad).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"BEGO TEJERO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIh_hJ85p_mqQqv3l4enOBuwLCBI0NRj-c_H5q_ycdJOsMNVw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Cuanto recogen los puestos la cantidad ingente de restos orgánicos de fruta y verdura, además de plásticos, cajas etc....inunda la zona. title: Mercadillo de Leganés
address: C. Scorpions, 28914 Leganés, Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["9 am–2 pm"],"Monday":["Closed"],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["Closed"],"Tuesday":["Closed"],"Wednesday":["Closed"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"alessandra garcez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4pLZ1fPlWNCHQ-KvDs1dI6UYUQOSSrtMtH-FLXCVos6IPTUbhVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"No le doy más de 5 estrellas porque no puedo. El mercado es excelente, con muchísima variedad, precios fantásticos y vendedores súper amables. Mi única queja es para la Comunidad de Madrid ha establecido un solo día de la semana para el mercado(viernes). Estamos en agosto/2025 y el país viví una crisis económica brutal, muchas personas estan en paro y sin poder comprar comida más barata, pero y aún así, mercadillos como este estan limitados funcionando apenas una vez por semana (en este caso los viernes). Podrían liberar el mercado en otros días, como los sábados, por ejemplo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel Martínez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3pHK3c_JONuTYitwLSAaPcUMdO5KWIbrcaOEXLEwDan8mmRU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"El día habitual del mercadillo son los viernes, y suelen ponerlo en esta ubicación; aunque también es verdad que, en función de los eventos que haya allí, muchas veces también lo mueven hacia otras calles de los alrededores.

Es bastante grande, con numerosos puestos de fruta, verduras, frutos secos y gominolas, ropa, accesorios, cinturones... Tienes prácticamente de todo lo que busques, a precios más o menos competitivos según el puesto en cuestión. Lo que sí, a nivel de comida ten cuidado cuál eliges: hay puestos con género bueno, de calidad media, pero en otros está bastante pasado y no merece pagar por ello, por muy barato que parezca. Más de una vez nos hemos encontrado con problemas al llegar a casa.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Edward Cuadrado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9xPW-pmo1gfom_udVYBcA2n5C_cHEX_txzwIYI3FZCZU9Py0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"No habían muchos vendedores pero siempre es una agradable experiencia","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Xuki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6tnRYnU9crlqsAnFMpWzCYiwMk_C0RdYoA8iNK07WWZgkkw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Es bueno el mercadillo pero casi el 90% de las veces de roban en los pesos, te ponen menos peso y algunas veces hasta 200g menos me han puesto. Encuentras vestimenta casual, ropa de cama, ropa interior,  zapatos, sandalias, bolsos, cosmeticos, macetas, entre otros.

Dejo algunas fotos

En casa de mi madre había muchísimas cosas, desde ropa, muebles, enseres, decoración, vajilla, …, muchas pero que muchas piezas, que han inventariado, cuidado y organizado fantásticamente para obtener el mejor resultado posible. Nos lo han organizado súper bien, y en todo momento nos hemos sentido tranquilas por dejar algo tan sensible, como es desprenderte de los recuerdos materiales de tu familiar, en sus manos.
Recomendable 100%.

Las prendas son de calidad premium fabricadas con materiales excepcionales y acabados impecables. El espacio de la boutique es moderno sofisticado y muy bien diseñado creando una experiencia de compra de lujo. Ofrecen desde vaqueros con cortes especiales hasta chaquetas de cuero blazers elegantes y accesorios exclusivos todos con el sello inconfundible de la marca. El personal es muy profesional conocedor de la marca y proporciona un servicio personalizado de alto nivel. Zara","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICaqIb7ygE&fid=0x0:0x8f646cbe432ce199"],"When":"2021-7-22"},{"Name":"Bárbara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeWP8uyRuANEZyv4VKL1MOJZQWyawqv3EBOe1m7Sfh_8Z8gmFm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Si yo fuera la coordinadora responsable de esta tienda, enviaría un mystery shopper para evaluar la atención que se da al cliente en esta tienda.

La encargada que estaba ayer 17/12 alrededor de las 20h tiene un trato muy poco profesional: mira por encima del hombro, te hace sentir como si te estuviera haciendo un favor en dedicarte un minuto de su tiempo cuando le pides ayuda, no ofrece soluciones y se dirige a las clientas con malas formas.

Una pena, porque estas personas son la cara visible de la tienda y manchan la reputación de Zara (no me extraña que se hagan videos virales de estos comportamientos). Y eso se traduce en menos clientas y menos ingresos a largo plazo. Y cualquier responsable enfocado en CX sabe verlo.

Yo soy de esas clientas que dejan todo ordenado, vuelvo a colocar todo en su sitio porque me da apuro y compro todos los meses. Lo único que espero recibir es lo que yo ofrecería, una sonrisa y ayuda. Pero después de esto y de otras situaciones que he vivido otras veces (no hay nadie en probadores para ayudarte, no hay tallas, tardan en subirte todo de almacén y nadie te da update mientras esperas, te evitan la mirada para no atenderte..) ya no voy volver a esta tienda, y me iré a otra donde me atiendan con una sonrisa o compraré online. Y tengo que reconocer que no sé si es cultura de empresa o, de esa tienda en general, pero en el Mango de ese mismo centro comercial el trato es muy bueno y siempre se acercan a ofrecerte ayuda.. no sé, lo mínimo que esperas con los precios que ya tienen estas tiendas.

Lo único que confío es que la Dirección sepa ver este tipo de cosas y se tomen medidas al respecto. Porque por lo que veo en los comentarios no es un caso aislado.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Mahmud Farhat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1akTswl-b2kher8iE2tB9fHP223fJmc_P5J908UmDmwMivA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The store is big and well organized, with a wide variety of styles and a good selection 👍

Overall: great selection, but the service could be much better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_Y8SWGzMMpAfn6hBDD7nQ&fid=0x0:0x4eb278e2bf9bcced"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"F Oli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4JWKiV6eSSoNtnqPipnq7yjcbWPg5eAniYCZdwsATp6idbA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Decent yet rushed help upon arrival by a female attendent. Answering clients whilst walking away, wouldn't look me in the eye and even asked me to bend down and get the item I HAD ASKED HIM, THE SHOP WORKER, for help. Utter lack of education, care and customer service! And that taking into account the fact that in Spain people give gifts on the 6th of January too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Appelsin Pikkens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-iIkaZr5TIckXNAMmp5sQtTY_MOF5KDA78BMAq48N_TJjOUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I went there on a Saturday at 3,30pm and the staff told me with bad manners that the fitting rooms were closed and they didn't know when the rooms would be ready again. I will not come back here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Baltieri Favoretto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaHvAUgxDvqDFf-v7buhI1WdsN5F14-tuaH_SxWLmKCB_bSbWu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"You should come only if you really really really want to buy something. Because of the pandemic they basically have only one cabin to try clothes and a big line for that. The line makes it more likely that you get covid than having two cabins, please tell them that. Also there is huge line kn the cashier","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"William Thompson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHC_QT2-KwDtr0jN1Vz7oFBGR551V0YQ0n3Aa4wgEOk4TzhzfD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great clothes at reasonable prices. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Milorad Mićić","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9ioFiV9ZIC43Tyb9hRNOo25CaObkQ_sdqiApHhtam6_KFr3G5vg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"On evening 01.11.2025
Extremely unpleasant experience. Two months after buying a jacket at Zara I was there again for buying something else, the security alarm went off as I was leaving the store. The security staff treated me like a criminal, demanding the receipt for an item I had bought months ago. After checking, they realized the jacket had been sold long ago, meaning it was their mistake that there is alarm still. No apology, just an awkward situation caused entirely by Zara’s security. Very disappointing for loyal customer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLvQcrXNEsZ0VIpeJSUGNh&fid=0x0:0x964e04f10f121e85"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Will U","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWP8jbV1ZSNlbb3gGjlXPCnc5XC1qGLpKrBjGMAfC-U-s2jDQhnkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Staff was not unfriendly to me but I did witness firsthand staff treating some Americans very poorly.

Only giving two stars because the location is not too busy for a flagship store, giving you plenty of breathing room and small fitting room queues.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Travel And food","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8JiHOqRmee8W13BRqj6DgHk8b-FqItwEqosmkswsy3gqf4VSKrA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My family and my extended families are big fans of Zara. I have been given a long shopping list as prices are so much cheaper in Madrid

However it was not an enjoyable shopping trip
I walked from one zara shop to another just to be met with unhelpful sales staffs. The multiple items I wanted became a major inconvenience for them

I was asked to wait wait and wait (items to collect rack)  while they source the items becos they are in the store and not in the shop
Finally when the items came some were missing and some were wrong sizes

There were other frustrated customers like me waiting and not looking happy at all

And their service attitude needs a lot of improvements

Please I hope some senior management of Zara can read my review and make effort not to let fans like us go thru what I did","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn2d780gE&fid=0x0:0x964e04f10f121e85"],"When":"2024-9-27"},{"Name":"XOXO Lind","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJR30TsRNnSMR2IjsAF2EqPFZqBifaAWgoYNXKun32sZGYMA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Some staffs can’t communicate with clients in English. As the location here I think Zara should hire more staffs who can speak fluent English as well, cuz it’s the commercial center and there are a lot of tourists from all over the world","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC2sZyDigE&fid=0x0:0x964e04f10f121e85"],"When":"2022-4-23"},{"Name":"YY","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkHx1IbBwn7ijuhECKtqGJtQjXK8KaStRYzxGzPo3tgay7z0buFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The largest Zara store according to a local, but we didn’t spot any loots of our own - they do have a home area selling products which is innovative though.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICX_Mupfg&fid=0x0:0x964e04f10f121e85"],"When":"2024-10-14"},{"Name":"Murphy Tassin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQ6HffsLHHWUMdbUvqs0Oz3J_5_npo-FR-6fL1t4ZwIBvM4Cyo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This flagship Zara store is a popular destination for tourists, offering a vast selection of trendy clothing across multiple floors. The store's impressive architecture and extensive range of styles make it a must-visit for fashion enthusiasts. However, customer service has been a point of contention, with numerous reviews highlighting instances of rude or dismissive behavior from staff, particularly towards non-Spanish-speaking visitors. Additionally, fitting rooms are often cramped and poorly lit, leading to long wait times and a less-than-ideal shopping experience. While the store's size and variety are commendable, the inconsistent service may detract from an otherwise enjoyable visit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jingjing Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKUQ_Bz6bhUMA3ATwxX41dq__81zWZtCpPVN7leMVjiZfpwfag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I read the reviews earlier I will not come to this store ! Staffs in this Zara store are unfriendly and rude. The staff in fitting room expecting clients to do their jobs e.g hang the clothes back to the rack although I’m ready to buy some of the clothes. They talk to you like giving orders rather than treat you as a client. Before visiting Zara I had a nice shopping experience in Mango next door.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ema Mušič","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyJ2JHBT5pGxAOQWjTLrOwQ-2b9yJvxyhHjSDap3KSLQfZABgp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"it was so fun!
they have lots of choice. 2 floors are dedicated to women and 1 floor for each children and men.
they also have a nice department of zara home and cosmetics","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-pr71mgE&fid=0x0:0x964e04f10f121e85"],"When":"2022-11-2"}]
